}

function.message: Rescheduled Nordlicht Health follow-up to two weeks from today (2026-06-11) with focused diffs. Updated both records that carry the follow-up date: accounts/acct_001.json (next_follow_up_on) and reminders/rem_001.json (due_on).
function.rulebook_notes: Applied AGENTS.md rule: keep diffs focused and update both reminder and owning account when both carry follow-up date. Relative date anchored to context date 2026-05-28.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence in accounts/acct_001.json and reminders/rem_001.json showed prior date 2026-05-20 in both fields; both were updated to 2026-06-11 (today + 14 days).
